Use THIS exact Cloudflare API token for deployment. Do NOT use any previous token.

Token:
cfat_k1ImskN0T38cJV3JgxsTYTqOINYwhxDmM9OCJmd8746f52ad

==================================================
DEPLOYMENT INSTRUCTIONS – FOLLOW EXACTLY
==================================================

1. Go to the worker directory:
cd worker

2. Set the token explicitly in the environment (DO NOT reuse any cached token):
export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="cfat_k1ImskN0T38cJV3JgxsTYTqOINYwhxDmM9OCJmd8746f52ad"

3. Confirm the token is set:
echo $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN

4. Deploy using wrangler:
npx wrangler deploy

==================================================
CRITICAL RULES
==================================================

- Do NOT use any previously stored token
- Do NOT use any token starting with cfat_yIzi...
- Do NOT skip the export step
- Do NOT modify any code
- Only deploy the current worker

==================================================
AFTER DEPLOY
==================================================

1. Confirm deployment success
2. Test:
POST /api/send-email-otp
3. Return the full response
